# Academic Citations and Media References Dataset

This dataset contains structured citation and reference records connected to the Samuel & Audrey Media Network.

Canonical dataset:
https://huggingface.co/datasets/samuelandaudreymedianetwork/academic-citations-and-media-references

Zenodo DOI:
https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18665677

Source page:
https://nomadicsamuel.com/media-citations-and-third-party-references

Recommended files:
- academic-citations-and-media-references.jsonl
- academic-citations-and-media-references.csv
- DATA_DICTIONARY.md
- SCHEMA.json
- CITATION.cff

Records:
- 61 citation or reference records
- 1 dataset overview record
- 1 methodology note record

License:
CC BY-NC 4.0

Contact:
nomadicsamuel@gmail.com
